metadata.description: Oleg's personal Claude Code toolkit. One marketplace, several kits. Single source of truth; consumed by any project.

plugins.name: workflow-kit
plugins.description: Framework-agnostic workflow: graphify, task-runner, phase-runner, spec-kit overlay, time-log, squash-commits.

plugins.name: laravel-kit
plugins.description: Laravel expertise: best-practices, Horizon config, Pint, larastan. Reusable across Laravel projects.

plugins.name: flutter-kit
plugins.description: Flutter expertise: best-practices, Patrol E2E, flutter-expert agent. For Flutter frontends.
